ogTitle: Moores Pocket vs Moorina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moores Pocket and Moorina.
heading: Moores Pocket vs Moorina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moores Pocket, Queensland and Moorina, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moores Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Moorina (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moores Pocket or Moorina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moores Pocket has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Moorina scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moores Pocket scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Moorina scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moores Pocket or Moorina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moores Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
